message:
[HIGH] fix(sync): propagate auto-flush JSONL scan errors

Auto-flush now distinguishes conflict-marker hits from JSONL scan I/O failures, preserving dirty markers and surfacing the error instead of reporting a successful skipped flush.

Also keeps the mixed-case JSONL roundtrip regression and recent clippy cleanup compiling in all-target test builds.

Verification: cargo fmt --check passed; git diff --check passed; ubs passed on touched files. rch cargo test/check/clippy are currently blocked before beads_rust by dirty /data/projects/frankensqlite path dependency compile errors in fsqlite-core::eval_group_agg_join_expr callers.
